message:
fix(engine): add canonical_tag for TEE platforms, schema version validation, and epoch replay rejection

Add TeePlatform::canonical_tag() decoupled from Display for stable
hashing contexts. Use it in SignedTrustRootOverrideArtifact canonical
bytes instead of the display string. Add schema_version validation to
TeeAttestationPolicy so unknown versions are rejected at parse time.
Tighten policy epoch guard from strict-less-than to less-than-or-equal
to reject replayed epochs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
